news.message: 13 Year Anniversary Week 2 Alerts are Live!

translations.en: 13 Year Anniversary Week 2 Alerts are Live!
translations.de: 13. Jubiläum - Alarmierungen der 2. Woche sind jetzt live!
translations.es: ¡Las alertas de la semana 2 del 13.º aniversario ya comenzaron!
translations.pt: Os Alertas da 2ª Semana do 13º Aniversário já estão disponíveis!
translations.ru: Вторая неделя Сигналов Тревоги, посвящённых празднованию 13-летия игры, уже началась!
translations.pl: Alarmy drugiego tygodnia 13. rocznicy są już dostępne!
translations.uk: Виклики 2-го тижня святкування 13-ї річниці вже тут!
translations.tr: 13. Yıl Dönümü 2. Hafta Süreli Görevleri Yayında!
translations.ja: 13周年記念アラート第2弾開催中
translations.zh: 十三周年纪念第 2 周警报已上线！
translations.tc: 13 週年紀念第二週警報任務現已上線！
translations.th: ภารกิจแจ้งเตือนฉลองครบรอบ 13 ปี สัปดาห์ที่ 2 เริ่มแล้ว

events.tooltip: Seal fractures across the Orb Vallis

variants.modifierDescription: Any damage received will impart radiation effects, and so will green clouds around the tileset.
Eximus units have a much higher spawn rate in this mission. Some of their auras stack.
Maximum Warframe Energy capacity is quartered. Energy Siphon is less effective.

deviation.name: Sealed Armor
deviation.description: Enemies take 90% less damage from non-Weak Point hits.

risks.name: Alluring Arcocanids
risks.description: As Rogue Arcocanids charge attacks, they pull Warframes towards them.

deviation.name: Alchemical Invulnerability
deviation.description: 10% of enemies are equipped with an impervious Elemental Barrier that can only be destroyed by an Amphor of the corresponding element.

risks.name: Bolstered Belligerents
risks.description: All enemies have Overguard equal to 50% of their max health.

deviation.name: Double Trouble
deviation.description: Two Necramech Demolishers will attack any Conduit, but their health is reduced.

risks.name: Vampyric Liminus
risks.description: Slow moving, immortal, Duviri Liminus drain health and energy from allies who get too close.

risks.name: Bold Venture
risks.description: Enemies deal -15% Damage and take +15% Damage but gain +15% Movement Speed, Attack Speed, and Fire Rate.

personalModifiers.name: Secondary Wounds
personalModifiers.description: Gain 1 Puncture Status Effect every time you take damage.

personalModifiers.name: Fractured Armor
personalModifiers.description: Casting an ability reduces armor by 10% for 10s.

personalModifiers.name: Ability Overload
personalModifiers.description: Using an Ability opens a Void Rift on top of you.

deviation.name: Parallel Evolution
deviation.description: As the Legacyte evolves other enemies present also gain new abilities.

risks.name: Jade Spirits
risks.description: Jade Wisps haunt the region. If approached, they chase down the player responsible and transform into Jade Light beams.

risks.name: Artillery Beacons
risks.description: When killed, Scaldra troops drop artillery beacons that summon bombardments.

deviation.name: Noise Suppression
deviation.description: Drones fly above Flare, spraying them with Efervon gas.

risks.name: Miasmite Swarm
risks.description: Techrot Miasmites swarm out of the shadows throught the mission.

risks.name: It's Alive
risks.description: Within the underground, hostile overgrowths will attack if players stops moving.

deviation.name: Toxic Tank
deviation.description: The tank has a Toxin aura, leaves Toxin trails, and its attacks all deal Toxin damage.

risks.name: Myopic Munitions
risks.description: Enemies will only take damage if a player is within 15m of them.

risks.name: Dense Fog
risks.description: Efervon gas blankets the level. Enemies may drop filters that can provide a temporary reprieve.

personalModifiers.name: Transference Distortion
personalModifiers.description: Transference into Operator and Drifter is blocked.

personalModifiers.name: Energy Exhaustion
personalModifiers.description: Lose 2 Energy per second for each enemy within 10 meters of you.

personalModifiers.name: Framecurse syndrome
personalModifiers.description: Activating an Ability inflicts 50 damage upon you.

upgrade.title: Bottled Lightning
upgrade.description: Add 25% Status Damage and Electricity Status Chance to all weapons.

upgrade.title: Punchcard
upgrade.description: Add +1.5m punch through to primary weapons.

challenge.title: Make it personal
challenge.description: Kill 150 Scaldra Troops with Melee Weapons

upgrade.title: Magnetic Menace
upgrade.description: Every 5th ability cast applies a Magnetic Status Effect to an enemy in front of you within 50m.

upgrade.title: Have A Blast
upgrade.description: Every 10th shot adds 10 Blast stacks on hit.

upgrade.title: Toxic Shot
upgrade.description: Add 25% Gas Status Chance to Primary and Secondary weapons.

upgrade.title: Practiced Precision
upgrade.description: +20% Melee Critical Chance (x2 for Heavy Attacks).
